_notes: Each entry was checked against multiple independent sources before being added. 'confidence' is 'high' only when sources agreed with no scope ambiguity. Anything with unresolved scope/date conflicts is marked 'needs_caveat' and should either be posted with the caveat text included, or skipped — never flattened into a clean-sounding number that isn't actually clean.

messi_2014_world_cup.stat_line: 7 appearances, 4 goals, 1 assist — Golden Ball winner, runner-up (lost final 1-0 to Germany, AET)
messi_2014_world_cup.suggested_hook: Messi's 2014 World Cup: best player of the tournament on a team that still lost the final. Peak individual brilliance or an overrated Golden Ball? 🤔

ronaldo_juventus_all_competitions.suggested_hook: 101 goals in 134 games in Serie A colours. Ronaldo's Juventus spell doesn't get talked about enough. 🐐

ronaldo_juventus_seriea_only.topic: Ronaldo's Juventus spell — Serie A only
ronaldo_juventus_seriea_only.stat_line: 98 appearances, 81 goals, 15 assists — Serie A only (narrower scope than the all-competitions figure above, don't mix the two in one post)
ronaldo_juventus_seriea_only.suggested_hook: Serie A only, not even counting Europe: 81 goals in 98 games for Ronaldo at Juventus. Still one of the most efficient spells by any striker in the league. 📈

messi_vs_chelsea.stat_line: UNRESOLVED — do not post a flat 'career total' number
messi_vs_chelsea.conflict_detail: StatMuse gives 3 goals in the Champions League specifically. An older Sportskeeda piece (pre-dating his 100th UCL goal, which was scored against Chelsea) had him at 1 goal in his first 9 meetings. No source gives a clean, current, all-competitions career total. Post the Champions-League-scoped number only if used ('3 UCL goals vs Chelsea'), or skip this comparison entirely.
